zh.lifeSummary: 當Hannah Wadhams於1680年10月25日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德時，她的父親John Wadham IV25歲，母親Hannah Bidwell23歲。她於1698年8月25日與David Tryon在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1731年1月5日在她的家鄉享年50歲，埋葬在美國康乃狄克州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hannah Wadhams于1680年10月25日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德时，她的父亲John Wadham IV25岁，母亲Hannah Bidwell23岁。她于1698年8月25日与David Tryon在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1731年1月5日在她的家乡享年50岁，埋葬在美国康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Wadhams
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Wadham, with post-medieval excrescent -s, a habitational name from Wadham in Knowstone (Devon). The placename derives from the Old English personal name Wada or Old English wād ‘woad’ + hām ‘village, homestead’ or hamm ‘water meadow’. Wadham College, Oxford, was founded in 1610 by Dorothy Wadham, widow of Nicholas Wadham (died 1609), a wealthy Somerset landowner.

nameMeanings.name: Hannah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the mother of the prophet Samuel (1 Samuel 1:2), Hebrew Hanna. It is derived from a Hebrew word meaning ‘He (i.e. God) has favoured me (i.e. with a child)’. See also Anne . This form of the name was taken up as a given name by the Puritans in the 16th and 17th centuries and remained popular until the late 19th century. Thereafter it fell somewhat from favour but has enjoyed a massive revival since the 1990s.

variants.name: Hanna
meanings: Either the biblical name ( see Hannah ) or a short form of Johanna .

variants.name: Hana
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Hannah Wadhams was born on 25 October 1680, in Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, her father, John Wadham IV, was 25 and her mother, Hannah Bidwell, was 23. She married David Tryon on 25 August 1698, in Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 5 January 1731, in her hometown, at the age of 50, and was buried in Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hannah Wadhams est née le 25 octobre 1680, à Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, John Wadham IV, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Hannah Bidwell, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé David Tryon le 25 août 1698, à Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 5 janvier 1731, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterrée à Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hannah Wadhams am 25. Oktober 1680 in Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Wadham IV 25 und ihre Mutter Hannah Bidwell 23. Sie hat am 25. August 1698 in Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America David Tryon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 5. Januar 1731 im Alter von 50 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hannah Wadhams è nata il il 25 ottobre 1680 nel Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, sua padre, John Wadham IV, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Hannah Bidwell, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato David Tryon il 25 agosto 1698, nel Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 5 gennaio 1731, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolta a Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Hannah Wadhamsが1680年10月25日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードウエスエルスフィールドで生まれた時，父John Wadham IVは25歳，母Hannah Bidwellは23歳であった。1698年8月25日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードウエスエルスフィールドでDavid Tryonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1731年1月5日に故郷で50歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ハートフォードウエスエルスフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colo: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 베더스필드
ko.Wethersfield Village Cemetery, Wethersfi: 미국 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 베더스필드 비라지 세멧리

ko.Glastonbury, Hartford, CT: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 글라스토버이
ko.Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Co: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드
ko.lifeSummary: Hannah Wadhams(이)가 1680년 10월 25일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 베더스필드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Wadham IV(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Hannah Bidwell(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1698년 8월 25일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 베더스필드에서 David Tryon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1731년 1월 5일 그녀의 고향에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 베더스필드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hannah Wadhams nasceu em 25 de outubro de 1680, em Wethersfield, Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America, seu pai, John Wadham IV, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Hannah Bidwell, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com David Tryon em 25 de agosto de 1698, em Wethersfield, Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 5 de janeiro de 1731, em sua cidade natal, com 50 anos, e foi sepultada em Wethersfield, Hartford, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.Glastonbury, Hartford, CT: гластонбури, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hannah Wadhams родилась 25 октября 1680 г. в местности ветирсфиелд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени John Wadham IV было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Hannah Bidwell, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени David Tryon 25 августа 1698 г. в местности ветирсфиелд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла 5 января 1731 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 50 лет и была похоронена в местности ветирсфиелд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hannah Wadhams nació el 25 de octubre de 1680, en Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, John Wadham IV, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Hannah Bidwell, tenía 23 años. Se casó con David Tryon el 25 de agosto de 1698, en Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 5 de enero de 1731, en su pueblo, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultada en Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, Estados Unidos.
